mustSupport: MarkItDown is primarily useful for document-to-Markdown conversion rather than clipboard semantic batching.
Clipboard ingestion still needs separate HTML or rich-text normalization.
If adopted, MarkItDown should sit behind an import adapter boundary.

criticalChecks: Do not reroute this batch into prompt-eval-experimentation.

annotationNotes: This batch is coherent enough that the link belongs inside the durable research cluster.
